message:
fix: rewrite stats.svg without nested SVG elements

GitHub's renderer mishandles nested <svg> tags, causing overlap.
Replaced with flat <circle> + <text> elements and a clean divider.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
